subject: Fermi  trigger No 679248723: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E.Gorbovskoy, K.Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, D. Vlasenko,

L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez, J.Martinez, A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez 
(INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220711.67 (trigger No 679248723,05h 24m 14.40s , -48d 09m 36.0s, R=6.79) errorbox  1 days 11238 sec after notice time and 1 days 30070 sec after trigger time at 2022-07-13 00:33:09 UT, with upper limit up to  17.1 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 78 deg. The sun  altitude  is -63.8 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -34 deg., longitude l = 255 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2028549

We obtain a following upper limits.
